{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Chan-hee
|class_id=22923
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This pure golden statue of Chan-hee is crafted by an absolute master, striving to capture just a fraction of the beauty of our iconic hostess, Chan-hee! With eyes that shimmer and glance, bringing a radiant charm, the exquisite visage is lifelike, making it a legendary collectible. This costly statue can stand as a symbol of the strong bond between you and Chan-hee!
|fame=64
|art=111
|fth=63
|civ=67
|tech=57
|ss1=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +6<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss2=Snail Leadership +7<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +8<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss3=Snail Leadership +8<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +10<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss4=Snail Leadership +10<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +14<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +14<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss5=Snail Leadership +12<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +18<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss6=Snail Leadership +15<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +24<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500
|ss7=Snail Leadership +15<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 10 Orange Orbs drawn, Snail DEF +24<br>Orange Orbs Drawn: 500/500<br>Snail Leadership +10 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x INTEL Drops +15%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x Card Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, DMG +15%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=dungeon@22923_1|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}
|3name=Grey Lead Chan-hee|3rec=0.38M|3atk=9869|3defense=6598|3hp=35564|3weak=2936
|4name=Iron Chan-hee|4rec=0.83M|4atk=18564|4defense=12411|4hp=126062|4weak=4594
|5name=Bronze Chan-hee|5rec=1.77M|5atk=30548|5defense=20422|5hp=345083|5weak=7134
|6name=Silver Chan-hee|6rec=3.58M|6atk=46188|6defense=30878|6hp=713665|6weak=10213
|Arec=6.78M|Aatk=65904|Adefense=44058|Ahp=1328171|Aweak=12446
}}}}
